strengths: Long tenure (15+ years) in software engineering across web, mobile, embedded and infrastructure
Hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling in current role
Founder of an open-source GIS platform, showing initiative and product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published AI products, or recognized AI thought leadership required for a Principal AI Strategy role
Title progression caps at Senior/Staff IC — no Principal, Director, or strategic advisory experience with customers/partners
No evidence of cloud platform strategy work, executive-level influence, or shaping future-state cloud products at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise or AI products
No Director-level IC or strategic advisory track record
Limited cloud-platform strategy and large-org influence

response.justification: The candidate is a competent senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and recent dabbling in MCP and agent tooling, but the role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products or platforms, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud and AI futures. The resume shows no published AI work, no Principal-level scope, no record of inspiring external audiences on disruptive AI strategy, and no evidence of shaping cloud-product direction — making this a weak fit for a Principal AI Strategy position.
